stimulus: Civil rights leader Bayard Rustin and labor organizer A. Philip Randolph worked together to plan the 1963 March on Washington, a demonstration that ______blank the goals of racial justice and economic equality for all Americans.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular verb "advances" agrees in number with the singular subject "demonstration."

Choice B is incorrect because the plural verb "have advanced" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "demonstration." Choice C is incorrect because the plural verb "were advancing" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "demonstration." Choice D is incorrect because the plural verb "advance" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "demonstration."
